name: Cooking Live Applesauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the apples thoroughly and cut them into quarters, removing the seeds and core.
2. Place the apple pieces in a steamer basket set over a pot with less than an inch of boiling water.
3. Cover and steam for 10 to 15 minutes or until very tender. Add more hot water to the pot if needed during steaming.
4. Allow the apples and cooking liquid to cool completely.
5. Peel the cooled apples using a knife, then puree them in a food processor or pass through a food mill to remove skins.
6. Stir in any reserved cooking liquid as needed to adjust the consistency.
Yield: about 2 cups applesauce
